ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the school district */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the district is located */,
  "nces_dist" TEXT /* NCES district identifier */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "district_type" TEXT /* Type of district (e.g., urban, rural, suburban) */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the district */,
  "graduation_rate" REAL /* Graduation rate of the district */,
  "average_teacher_salary" REAL /* Average salary of teachers in the district */,
  "funding_per_student" REAL /* Funding allocated per student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school district */,
  "total_population" INTEGER /* Total population estimate */,
  "white_alone" INTEGER /* White alone population estimate */,
  "black_or_african_american_alone" INTEGER /* Black or African American alone population estimate */,
  "american_indian_and_alaska_native_alone" INTEGER /* American Indian and Alaska Native alone population estimate */,
  "asian_alone" INTEGER /* Asian alone population estimate */,
  "native_hawaiian_and_other_pacific_islander_alone" INTEGER /* Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander alone population estimate */,
  "some_other_race_alone" INTEGER /* Some other race alone population estimate */,
  "two_or_more_races" INTEGER /* Two or more races population estimate */,
  "hispanic_or_latino_origin" INTEGER /* Hispanic or Latino origin population estimate */,
  "white_not_hispanic_or_latino" INTEGER /* White alone, not Hispanic or Latino population estimate */,
  "population_20_to_64_years" INTEGER /* Population 20 to 64 years estimate */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age of the population */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the population */,
  "poverty_rate" REAL /* Poverty rate of the population */,
  "foreign_born_population" INTEGER /* Number of foreign-born residents */,
  "household_size" REAL /* Average household size */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school district */,
  "employment_population_ratio" REAL /* Employment to population ratio */,
  "employment_white_alone" REAL /* Employment to population ratio for White alone */,
  "employment_black_or_african_american_alone" REAL /* Employment to population ratio for Black or African American alone */,
  "employment_american_indian_and_alaska_native_alone" REAL /* Employment to population ratio for American Indian and Alaska Native alone */,
  "employment_asian_alone" REAL /* Employment to population ratio for Asian alone */,
  "employment_native_hawaiian_and_other_pacific_islander_alone" REAL /* Employment to population ratio for Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander alone */,
  "employment_some_other_race_alone" REAL /* Employment to population ratio for Some other race alone */,
  "employment_two_or_more_races" REAL /* Employment to population ratio for Two or more races */,
  "employment_hispanic_or_latino_origin" REAL /* Employment to population ratio for Hispanic or Latino origin */,
  "employment_white_not_hispanic_or_latino" REAL /* Employment to population ratio for White alone, not Hispanic or Latino */,
  "employment_population_20_to_64_years" REAL /* Employment to population ratio for Population 20 to 64 years */,
  "total_employed" INTEGER /* Total number of employed individuals */,
  "total_unemployed" INTEGER /* Total number of unemployed individuals */,
  "labor_force_participation_rate" REAL /* Labor force participation rate */,
  "average_weekly_earnings" REAL /* Average weekly earnings of employed individuals */,
  "industry_sectors" TEXT /* Main industry sectors in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "unemployment" (
  "unemployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unemployment record */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school district */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate */,
  "unemployment_white_alone" REAL /* Unemployment rate for White alone */,
  "unemployment_black_or_african_american_alone" REAL /* Unemployment rate for Black or African American alone */,
  "unemployment_american_indian_and_alaska_native_alone" REAL /* Unemployment rate for American Indian and Alaska Native alone */,
  "unemployment_asian_alone" REAL /* Unemployment rate for Asian alone */,
  "unemployment_native_hawaiian_and_other_pacific_islander_alone" REAL /* Unemployment rate for Native Hawaiian and Other Pacific Islander alone */,
  "unemployment_some_other_race_alone" REAL /* Unemployment rate for Some other race alone */,
  "unemployment_two_or_more_races" REAL /* Unemployment rate for Two or more races */,
  "unemployment_hispanic_or_latino_origin" REAL /* Unemployment rate for Hispanic or Latino origin */,
  "unemployment_white_not_hispanic_or_latino" REAL /* Unemployment rate for White alone, not Hispanic or Latino */,
  "unemployment_population_20_to_64_years" REAL /* Unemployment rate for Population 20 to 64 years */,
  "total_labor_force" INTEGER /* Total labor force */,
  "long_term_unemployment_rate" REAL /* Long-term unemployment rate */,
  "short_term_unemployment_rate" REAL /* Short-term unemployment rate */,
  "youth_unemployment_rate" REAL /* Youth unemployment rate (16-24 years) */,
  "seasonal_unemployment_rate" REAL /* Seasonal unemployment rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unemployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_unemployment_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's school district */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last user login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_categories" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race category */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_types" (
  "employment_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment type */,
  "employment_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the employment type (e.g., full-time, part-time, self-employed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "educational_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each educational program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the educational program */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school district */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "funding_amount" REAL /* Amount of funding allocated to the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_educational_programs_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "policy_decisions" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the policy becomes effective */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Expected impact of the policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource allocation */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school district */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., funding, materials, personnel) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the resource allocated */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date of the allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocations_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "intervention_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention program */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school district */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the program */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the program */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome or results of the program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_intervention_programs_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the validation */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being validated */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Identifier of the record being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of the validation */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of the validation (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, logout, view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
